who: paralegals at boutique law firms processing 5–15 cases/month
offer: For paralegals at boutique law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient legal research causes delayed case preparations. We provide summarized case law and regulatory changes instead of manual case law research and regulatory updates.
problem: Inefficient legal research processes lead to delayed case preparations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on legal workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 paralegals with demo video
Join forums where paralegals share useful tools
try_it: Let users try case law summaries and regulatory alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing case data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps needed in user onboarding
